name: Miniature Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and melted butter in a bowl. Stir well until all crumbs are coated.
2. Line a 1-3/4-inch muffin pan with miniature paper liners.
3. Spoon 1 teaspoon of the crumb mixture into each liner, pressing it gently into the bottom.
4. In an electric mixer, beat the cream cheese on high speed until light and fluffy. Gradually add sugar, mixing well.
5. Add egg and vanilla extract, beating thoroughly to combine.
6. Pour the batter into the lined liners.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
8. Spoon about 1/4 teaspoon of strawberry preserves over each cheesecake.
9. Allow to chill thoroughly before serving.
Yield: Approximately 2 dozen
